results.expected_result: partial missing stays null (role-aware mesh suite)
results.actual_result: {"topo": {"metric_id": "MVR-001-TOPOLOGY_SUITE", "score": null, "scoring_status": "NOT_EXECUTED", "evaluation_status": "NOT_EXECUTED", "missing_inputs": ["geometry_role", "non_manifold_edge_count", "degenerate_triangle_count", "zero_area_face_count", "duplicate_vertex_ratio", "flipped_normal_ratio", "disconnected_island_count", "boundary_edge_count", "self_intersection_flag"], "formula": "Weighted role profile over topology diagnostics; OPEN_SURFACE/VISUAL_SHELL/SCAN_REFERENCE do not require watertight (boundary_edge_count may be >0). results.expected_result: OPEN_SURFACE allows poly scoring; topology remains NOT_EXECUTED until diagnostics

CLOSED_SOLID/COLLISION_MESH may require boundary_edge_count==0 and self_intersection_flag==false."}, "poly": {"metric_id": "MVR-002-POLY_EFFICIENCY", "score": 1.0, "scoring_status": "EVALUATED", "evaluation_status": "EVALUATED", "missing_inputs": [], "formula": "clamp01(1 - abs(polygon_count - target_poly_budget) / max(target_poly_budget, 1))"}, "cov": 0.75}

results.expected_result: CAD evaluates when comparable; nominal=0 NOT_EXECUTED; large error clamps to 0
results.actual_result: {"agg": 0.985, "zero_tol": {"metric_id": "CER-001-TOLERANCE", "score": null, "scoring_status": "NOT_EXECUTED", "evaluation_status": "NOT_EXECUTED", "missing_inputs": [], "formula": "If abs(nominal_dim)==0 \u2192 NOT_EXECUTED. Else relative_error=abs(measured_dim-nominal_dim)/abs(nominal_dim); score=max(0, 1-relative_error)."}, "clamp": {"metric_id": "CER-001-TOLERANCE", "score": 0.0, "scoring_status": "EVALUATED", "evaluation_status": "EVALUATED", "missing_inputs": [], "formula": "If abs(nominal_dim)==0 \u2192 NOT_EXECUTED.
